_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL
name: Rust Auto Wipe
author: xgigabaitx@gmail.com
description: Advanced Rust egg with layered config.sh/config.defaults.sh, map rotation, cron-priority wipes, and automatic restart cleanup.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
set -e
if [[ "${STEAM_USER}" == "" ]] || [[ "${STEAM_PASS}" == "" ]]; then
  STEAM_USER=anonymous
  STEAM_PASS=""
  STEAM_AUTH=""
fi
cd /tmp
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamcmd
curl -sSL -o steamcmd.tar.gz https://steamcdn-a.akamaihd.net/client/installer/steamcmd_linux.tar.gz
tar -xzvf steamcmd.tar.gz -C /mnt/server/steamcmd
mkdir -p /mnt/server/steamapps
cd /mnt/server/steamcmd
chown -R root:root /mnt
export HOME=/mnt/server
./steamcmd.sh +force_install_dir /mnt/server +login ${STEAM_USER} ${STEAM_PASS} ${STEAM_AUTH} +app_update ${SRCDS_APPID} ${INSTALL_FLAGS} validate +quit
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32
cp -v linux32/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk32/steamclient.so
mkdir -p /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64
cp -v linux64/steamclient.so /mnt/server/.steam/sdk64/steamclient.so
curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tensacraft/eggs/main/rust/startup.sh" -o /mnt/server/startup.sh
curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tensacraft/eggs/main/rust/config.defaults.sh" -o /mnt/server/config.defaults.sh
if [[ ! -f /mnt/server/config.sh ]]; then
  curl -fsSL "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/tensacraft/eggs/main/rust/config.sh" -o /mnt/server/config.sh
fi
chmod +x /mnt/server/startup.sh
chmod 644 /mnt/server/config.defaults.sh
if [[ -f /mnt/server/config.sh ]]; then
  chmod 644 /mnt/server/config.sh
fi

variables.name: Steam App ID
variables.description: Game ID for Rust dedicated server.

variables.name: Steam User
variables.description: Steam username. Leave empty for anonymous.

variables.name: Steam Password
variables.description: Steam password.

variables.name: Steam Auth
variables.description: Steam Guard code.

variables.name: Install Flags
variables.description: Extra flags for SteamCMD install.

variables.name: Server Name
variables.description: Server name in browser list.

variables.name: Description
variables.description: Short description shown under server title.

variables.name: Server URL
variables.description: Website URL shown in-game.

variables.name: Server Image
variables.description: Header image URL.

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Maximum connected players.

variables.name: Save Interval
variables.description: Auto-save interval in seconds.

variables.name: Server Identity
variables.description: Save folder identity.

variables.name: Query Port
variables.description: Steam query port.

variables.name: RCON Port
variables.description: RCON TCP port.

variables.name: RCON Password
variables.description: RCON password.

variables.name: Rust+ App Port
variables.description: Companion app port. -1 disables.

variables.name: Level
variables.description: Default procedural/custom level when config.sh map rotation does not choose a URL map entry.

variables.name: World Size
variables.description: Default procedural map size when config.sh does not override it.

variables.name: World Seed
variables.description: Default map seed. 0 uses seed.txt or a generated random seed when config.sh does not override it.

variables.name: Custom Map URL
variables.description: Optional direct map URL. config.sh can also rotate URL entries through WIPE_MAPS.

variables.name: Framework
variables.description: Server framework: vanilla, oxide, carbon.

variables.name: Additional Args
variables.description: Extra simple startup flags for RustDedicated. Prefer dedicated fields or config.sh for complex values.

variables.name: Auto Wipe Enabled
variables.description: Legacy compatibility fallback. Prefer AUTO_WIPE_ENABLED in config.sh.

variables.name: Wipe Cron Schedules
variables.description: Legacy compatibility fallback. Prefer the WIPE_CRON_SCHEDULES array in config.sh.

variables.name: Wipe Remove Files
variables.description: Legacy compatibility fallback. Prefer WIPE_REMOVE_PATTERNS in config.sh.

variables.name: Wipe Remove Patterns
variables.description: Legacy compatibility fallback. Prefer WIPE_REMOVE_PATTERNS and WIPE_IGNORE_PATTERNS in config.sh.

variables.name: Wipe Reset Seed
variables.description: Legacy compatibility fallback. Prefer WIPE_RESET_SEED in config.sh.

variables.name: Map Rotation Mode
variables.description: Legacy compatibility fallback. Prefer MAP_ROTATION_MODE in config.sh.

variables.name: Wipe Map List
variables.description: Legacy compatibility fallback. Prefer the WIPE_MAPS array in config.sh.

variables.name: Clean Each Restart
variables.description: Legacy compatibility fallback. Prefer CLEAN_EACH_RESTART in config.sh.

variables.name: Clean Files On Restart
variables.description: Legacy compatibility fallback. Prefer CLEAN_FILES_ON_RESTART in config.sh.
